title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabHotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabHotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
FabHotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!
